title: avenastrum alpinum
intro: Avenastrum alpinum, also known as Alpina, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various ailments. The plant is known to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, providing relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Avenastrum alpinum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being, particularly in relation to digestive health and skin conditions.
